name: Litmos
description: Monitor SAP Litmos LMS for user access, team-based role controls, and security training compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Litmos admin account
2. Go to Account Settings > Manage API Key
3. Generate or copy your API key
4. Enter your API key, source name (your Litmos domain), and select the correct regional base URL

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Litmos Admin > Account Settings > Manage API Key. Generate or copy your API key.

credentialFields.label: Source (App Name)
credentialFields.helpText: Your Litmos company domain or app name, e.g. 'yourcompany.litmos.com'. Used as the 'source' query parameter.

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Litmos API base URL. US: https://api.litmos.com, AU: https://api.litmos.com.au, EU: https://api.litmoseu.com

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Litmos LMS users to verify active accounts and employee access to the learning management platform

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews Litmos teams to verify team-based role structure and organizational access controls
